description: Exclusively target SC student scholarships and income restrictions.
query: I am a 19 year old SC student from Uttar Pradesh pursuing my BA degree. My family's annual income is 1.5 Lakhs.
expected_matches: Post Matric Scholarship Scheme for SC Students

description: Apprentice seeking technical training and placements.
query: I am a 20 year old male ITI diploma holder from Haryana. I completed my diploma last year and am currently looking for hands-on apprenticeship opportunities.

description: Eligible candidate for Prime Minister's Internship Scheme (PMIS).
query: I am 22 years old and currently unemployed. I graduated with a B.Com degree last year and live in Delhi. My family's total annual income is 3.2 Lakhs.

description: Female technical student eligible for AICTE Pragati scholarship.
query: I am an 18-year-old girl from Maharashtra. I just got admitted to the first year of my B.Tech engineering degree. My parents' annual income is 4 Lakhs.

description: Rural unskilled worker seeking manual wage labour.
query: I am a 42-year-old laborer from a village in Bihar looking for manual work. I did not go to school.
expected_matches: Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act (MGNREGA)

description: Young girl student eligible for secondary education incentive (NMMS/NSIGSE).
query: I am a 14-year-old girl from Rajasthan. I passed class 8 and have been admitted to class 9 in a government school. My parents make 1.8 Lakhs per year.
expected_matches: National Scheme for Incentive to Girls for Secondary Education (NSIGSE)

description: Rural BPL candidate from Odisha seeking free training and lodging.
query: I am 24 years old, unemployed, and live in a village in Odisha. I completed class 10. We have a BPL ration card and very low household income.
expected_matches: Deen Dayal Upadhyaya Grameen Kaushalya Yojana (DDU-GKY)

description: Exclusion test for high family income (should exclude income-restricted schemes).
query: I am a 22 year old unemployed engineering graduate from Delhi. My family's annual income is 10 Lakhs.

description: Exclusion test for age restrictions (PMIS is restricted to 21-24 years).
query: I am a 26 year old unemployed graduate from Bangalore. My family income is 2.5 Lakhs.

description: Candidate seeking skill development through MSDE schemes.
query: I am a 29 year old student from Pune looking to join certified short-term vocational courses.

description: Exclusion check for underage child (lower limit validation).
query: I am a 9-year-old child in primary school from Delhi.

description: Exclusion check for overage citizen (upper limit validation).
query: I am a 68-year-old retired grandparent living in Bangalore.

description: Occupation disqualification (government employee, not eligible for job assistance/wages).
query: I am a 30-year-old government clerk from Mumbai earning 6 Lakhs per year.

description: Educational mismatch (illiterate candidate seeking technical degree scholarships).
query: I am a 22-year-old illiterate youth from a village in Madhya Pradesh seeking admission to a technical B.Tech scholarship.

description: Candidate check for general job listing portal registration (NCS matching).
query: I am a 20 year old college student from Kerala. My family income is 1.5 Lakhs per year.
